name: RWA World Newsletter
description: Custom extraction rules for RWA World beehiiv newsletter (weekly Wed tokenization digest). Pulls headlines + funding from Rapid Fire Takeaways and emoji-prefixed deep sections. Filters out subscribe CTAs, feedback widgets, and Beehiiv platform chrome.
exclude_patterns: we're here for all of it

google_sheets.notes: Set spreadsheet_id in the Daily Audio Briefing app settings. Recommended: same Sheet as CryptoSum but a separate tab ('RWA World') so both pipelines coexist.

notes: Extracts tokenization / RWA / stablecoin news from RWA World's weekly Wednesday issue. Pulls structured headlines from the '🔥 Rapid Fire Takeaways' bullet list and supporting context from emoji-prefixed deep sections (💰, ⚡, 🏛️, 🔓, 📊, 💸). Blocks self-referencing rwa-world.beehiiv.com links to avoid recursive ingest. Cadence: weekly Wed; first 2026 issue 2026-04-08 after winter hiatus.
